zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hardreshull於大約1320年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Sir John Hardreshull30歲，母親Margaret Stafford28歲。她於1345年與Sir John Culpeper在英國英格蘭肯特波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1386年在英國英格蘭享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Hardreshull于大约1320年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲Sir John Hardreshull30岁，母亲Margaret Stafford28岁。她于1345年与Sir John Culpeper在英国英格兰肯特波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1386年在英国英格兰享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hardreshull was born about 1320, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Hardreshull, was 30 and her mother, Margaret Stafford, was 28. She married Sir John Culpeper in 1345, in Pembury, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1386, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Hardreshull est née environ 1320, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Hardreshull, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stafford, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Culpeper en 1345, à Pembury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1386, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Hardreshull um 1320 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Hardreshull 30 und ihre Mutter Margaret Stafford 28. Sie hat 1345 in Pembury, Kent, England, United Kingdom Sir John Culpeper geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1386 im Alter von 68 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hardreshull è nata il circa 1320 nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Hardreshull, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Margaret Stafford, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Culpeper nel 1345, nel Pembury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1386, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hardreshull(이)가 대략 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Hardreshull(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Stafford(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1345년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 p버이에서 Sir John Culpeper(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1386년 영국 잉글랜드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hardreshull родилась около 1320 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Hardreshull было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stafford, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Culpeper в 1345 г. в местности пембури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1386 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.
